creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 162743
patch

Attached is a patch, and koobs asked to rename it to the PyPI compliant
name py-git-up, when I first committed the port. Now it's time to upgrade
and also rename the port, if the maintainer approves.

Note to koobs: Is there any mention of the PyPI/portname coupling in the
ports handbook ?
